messages.content:
Dear Friends
 
With a broader objective to spread the knowledge of the divine subject of Vedas (including real and fundamental knowledge of astrology, vastu and samudrik shastra) and to start with a baby step, I have come out with my web-site on the subject which is www.sajjan-astrovastu.com.
 
To answer the burning question in your mind as to why to share with you and how through this website, I shall come back to you very soon.
 
My objective is to spread this ultimate knowledge in the entire world in available limited time for which your assistance will be a must.
 
"Those who are wise do not deny the importance of any subject/object unless they satisfy themselves as regards its non-existence......."
 
Links:
 
1. www.sajjan-astrovastu.com
2. www.sajjanksharma.com
3. http://www.facebook.com/pages/Sajjan-Kumar-Sharma/209733762393362
 
 
Cheers
 
Sajjan K Sharma

share.share_text: Primarily A study of Planetary Positions as basis of Analysis including for understanding the probable reasons of problems and related probable solutions.
